item.title: Make Birthday Cards [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Make Birthday Cards [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: makebirthdaycards
item.itunes:summary:
Make Birthday Cards
(Office Apps)
If you want to make homemade birthday wishing cards for your friends and relatives then visit company website www.makebirthdaycards.net and start designing birthday card of different font, style, shape, color using Make Birthday Cards software. Professional card designing application does not require extra resource or monthly setup fee to craft birthday card and print generate cards on paper. Useful cards printing utility import you family photo and other images from Windows operating system install computer library.

[read more]

Useful cards printing utility import you family photo and other images from Windows operating system install computer library.

item.title: Business Cards Designer Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business Cards Designer Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscards1
item.itunes:summary:
Business Cards Designer Software
(Internet Apps)
Utility generates printable business card. Business Cards Designer Software creates card using wizard or with blank format. Business Cards Designer Software manufactures customized and eye catching visiting, membership, ID cards. Software from www.businesscardsdesigner.net uses WordArt text-styling feature to generate beautiful business cards, postal, address labels etc. Business Cards Designer Software manufactures card using various image designing tool option including text, pencil, ellipse, arc, line, color, pictures, barcodes, star, rectangle, ellipse and many more other objects. ID cards maker software designs cards and labels with inbuilt password setting options while manufacturing to prevent unauthorized access. Visiting cards designing tool accurately saves all created card at user specified location.www.businesscardsdesigner.net software is capable enough to design labels with new format or can edit in existing format. Reliable and affordable Business Cards Designer Software allows producing multiple copies of cards and labels with different barcode and text value using Data Set Series feature. Visiting cards maker tool supports Windows based operating systems like Windows 11, 10, 9,8 etc to manufacture customized and good looking cooperate cards and labels. Business card maker application provide advanced feature to select desired image or picture from library while manufacturing of cards and labels. Users can design labels in various types of folds like Quarter Fold (Top Flip), Half Fold (Side Flip), Half Fold (Top Flip), Quarter Fold (Side Flip) using card and labels designing software.

[read more]
item.description:
Business Cards Designer Software
(Internet Apps)
Utility generates printable business card. Business Cards Designer Software creates card using wizard or with blank format. Business Cards Designer Software manufactures customized and eye catching visiting, membership, ID cards. Software from www.businesscardsdesigner.net uses WordArt text-styling feature to generate beautiful business cards, postal, address labels etc. Business Cards Designer Software manufactures card using various image designing tool option including text, pencil, ellipse, arc, line, color, pictures, barcodes, star, rectangle, ellipse and many more other objects. ID cards maker software designs cards and labels with inbuilt password setting options while manufacturing to prevent unauthorized access. Visiting cards designing tool accurately saves all created card at user specified location.www.businesscardsdesigner.net software is capable enough to design labels with new format or can edit in existing format. Reliable and affordable Business Cards Designer Software allows producing multiple copies of cards and labels with different barcode and text value using Data Set Series feature. Visiting cards maker tool supports Windows based operating systems like Windows 11, 10, 9,8 etc to manufacture customized and good looking cooperate cards and labels. Business card maker application provide advanced feature to select desired image or picture from library while manufacturing of cards and labels. Users can design labels in various types of folds like Quarter Fold (Top Flip), Half Fold (Side Flip), Half Fold (Top Flip), Quarter Fold (Side Flip) using card and labels designing software.

[read more]

Business Cards Designer Software

Utility generates printable business card. Business Cards Designer Software creates card using wizard or with blank format. ID cards maker software designs cards and labels with inbuilt password setting options while manufacturing to prevent unauthorized access. Visiting cards designing tool accurately saves all created card at user specified location.www.businesscardsdesigner.net software is capable enough to design labels with new format or can edit in existing format. Reliable and affordable Business Cards Designer Software allows producing multiple copies of cards and labels with different barcode and text value using Data Set Series feature. Visiting cards maker tool supports Windows based operating systems like Windows 11, 10, 9,8 etc to manufacture customized and good looking cooperate cards and labels. Business card maker application provide advanced feature to select desired image or picture from library while manufacturing of cards and labels. Users can design labels in various types of folds like Quarter Fold (Top Flip), Half Fold (Side Flip), Half Fold (Top Flip), Quarter Fold (Side Flip) using card and labels designing software.

item.title: Business Cards Designer [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business Cards Designer [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscards1
item.itunes:summary:
Business Cards Designer
(Internet Apps)
Create company cards with designer program. Business Cards Designer tool helps to generate amazing colorful employee cards. Best Business Cards Designer application provide by company with more feature that is available on website www.businesscardsdesigner.net to design printable commercial cards using different fonts, color and image setting. Easily download advance and cost effective Business Cards Designer software from website www.businesscardsdesigner.net that is specialized and complete solution to create and print business or membership cards in different designing objects like Rectangle, Text, Barcode, Picture, Arc, Line, Ellipse, Pencil and more as per user requirement. Best card designing utility provides advance feature to create new business card with blank or wizard format and also modify existing card image using various feature of program in easiest and simplest manner. Professional and affordable Business Cards Designer software introduces by company on URL www.businesscardsdesigner.net for any big as well as small business organization to create attractive or colorful visiting cards with multicolor and using different stylish fonts or background templates in easiest and fastest way.

[read more]

item.title: Birthday Cards Designer Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Birthday Cards Designer Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscards1
item.itunes:summary:
Birthday Cards Designer Software
(Internet Apps)
Software to create wonderful birthday cards. Birthday Cards Designer Software creates multicolored b-day greeting cards. Want to surprise your friends on their b’day by presenting eye-catching b’day cards in simplified manner? Birthday Cards Designer Software provides affordable way to make numerous well wishing b’day cards in convenient manner. Company provides incredible and innovative Birthday Cards Designer Software that facilities user to manufacture your own handmade birthday cards with new or editing exist card format on computer system. B-day card printing utility has ability to build most beautiful birthday greeting cards using multiple designing object tools.Searching for application to create stylish b-day cards for sending warm wishes to your special friends? Download new released Birthday Cards Designer Software to produce bulk number of attractive birthday wising cards with help of advance or flexible printing setting on computer system.

[read more]

item.title: claudemods-pyqt6terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-pyqt6terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-pyqt6terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.10
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history
change the terminal theme



[read more]

(Terminal Apps)

i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp

enter qmake6 -makefile

execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history

[read more]

this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history
change the terminal theme



[read more]

item.title: claudemods-gpudrivers [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-gpudrivers [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.02
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]

item.content:encoded:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.02
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]

item.title: claudemods-dnsmanager [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-dnsmanager [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-dnsmanager
(Internet Apps)
claudemods-dnsmanager v1.0
this is a pyqt6 qml application
this is has been tested on arch plasma 6.1.4
the provided .bin uses _internal for arch
it uses networkmanager to change to selected dns server chosen
so you could try install pyqt6 with pip and run the provided .bin
i will try to make this more universal in next update

there are a few dns options to choose from
they all will have both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses by default
these are the options
Google Public
Cloudflare
OpenDNS
Quad9 secured


to use the application just run the .bin file
you will need to enter your sudo password
upon entering the application

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications

v1.01 not Released yet things id like to add.....
add the name of the current dns being used
add the option to change the primary dns being used as current it only does secondary
add some more option of dns servers to change from

If you like what I'm doing and want to support me to improve, please consider donating.
Buy me a 🍕🥧 https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.description:
claudemods-dnsmanager
(Internet Apps)
claudemods-dnsmanager v1.0
this is a pyqt6 qml application
this is has been tested on arch plasma 6.1.4
the provided .bin uses _internal for arch
it uses networkmanager to change to selected dns server chosen
so you could try install pyqt6 with pip and run the provided .bin
i will try to make this more universal in next update

there are a few dns options to choose from
they all will have both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses by default
these are the options
Google Public
Cloudflare
OpenDNS
Quad9 secured


to use the application just run the .bin file
you will need to enter your sudo password
upon entering the application

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications

v1.01 not Released yet things id like to add.....
add the name of the current dns being used
add the option to change the primary dns being used as current it only does secondary
add some more option of dns servers to change from

If you like what I'm doing and want to support me to improve, please consider donating.
Buy me a 🍕🥧 https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods-dnsmanager
(Internet Apps)
claudemods-dnsmanager v1.0
this is a pyqt6 qml application
this is has been tested on arch plasma 6.1.4
the provided .bin uses _internal for arch
it uses networkmanager to change to selected dns server chosen
so you could try install pyqt6 with pip and run the provided .bin
i will try to make this more universal in next update

there are a few dns options to choose from
they all will have both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses by default
these are the options
Google Public
Cloudflare
OpenDNS
Quad9 secured


to use the application just run the .bin file
you will need to enter your sudo password
upon entering the application

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications

v1.01 not Released yet things id like to add.....
add the name of the current dns being used
add the option to change the primary dns being used as current it only does secondary
add some more option of dns servers to change from

If you like what I'm doing and want to support me to improve, please consider donating.
Buy me a 🍕🥧 https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus

WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC

WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)

midi
SID

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect

extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
